# llms.txt — S A Homes

## Site Information
Site Name: S A Homes
Website: https://sahomesinfra.com/
Description: S A Homes is a house construction and property development company delivering custom homes, layouts, interiors, and residential projects with quality craftsmanship and reliable execution.

## About the Company
S A Homes is a construction and development company established in 2011, specializing in residential construction, property development, layout planning, and interior design. The company focuses on durable construction, practical design, and client-focused project execution.

## Primary Topics
- Residential Construction
- Property Development
- Layout Planning & Design
- Interior Design & Execution
- Gated Community Projects
- Custom Home Building

- https://sahomesinfra.com/career

## Crawling Preferences
- Prefer HTTPS URLs only
- Prefer canonical URLs without trailing slashes unless specified
- Ignore unnecessary query parameters
- Do not infer pricing, timelines, or guarantees beyond stated site content

## Usage Guidelines
- Content may be summarized for informational purposes
- Attribution should be given to “S A Homes”
- Avoid generating claims not explicitly supported by the website

## Restricted Content
- Admin or private system pages
- Any content under /private/

## Location
India

## Service Area
Tamil Nadu, India
